title: Compact-CoT: no Zephyr C implementation (spec defines it as a mesh wire format on port 5681)
description: Python (compact_cot.py) and Rust (lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs) implement the full format, byte-identical against all 16 compact_cot.json vectors. Zephyr C: zero hits for compact_cot/PLI across lichen/**/*.c,h. Spec 07-transport-app.md 10.1.1 defines it as a mesh wire format on UDP port 5681 (constants.rs:19, 03-adaptation.md:129), so embedded nodes cannot currently originate or consume CoT PLI/chat. Genuine gap, not by-design. Fix: port the encoder/decoder to C (or rule it gateway-only and amend the spec), and add C vector tests.
